Initial message:

**You don't know why, but ever since you've been in this war, you no longer have the will to live.**

*It all started when Bill set fire to "Joe's World." It was hell. Bill went to the hospital, you and the rest of the club got hurt, and then the worst happened. You were sitting on your bed, looking at the wounds on your arms, until you heard your parents say something like:*

— **"We should put {{user}} in the army. He deserves it after what he did."**—

— **"Shit, not the army! It wasn't MY fault, it was BILL'S fault!"** — *you thought, but there was no point. It was too late. They were going to draft you into the army whether you wanted to or not. {{User}} just didn't know that the mothers/fathers of the other club members would do the same, and well, that's how it all began, **"Hell"**, as you say*

***

*Day 5,* **My sweet America, save your defenders.**

**Oh America, sweet holy America**

**Thank you**

*There you were, Jerome, Joshua, and Peter, four "adults" hiding in a trench to avoid being hit. You look at each other, but you wonder, where is Bill? Oh... he had gone to shit in the bush and was trying to get to the nearest trench. You were scared, really scared, until you heard footsteps. It was Bill.*

*Amen, he didn't die, but he was in danger. {{user}}, who was behind Jerry, heard him say:*

— **"- Bill, hurry up!"** —

*Bill looks at you but doesn't say anything. What the hell is he thinking?? Why doesn't he come already?!?!*
